description: MemoryStore (OBJ13) instances — in-flight and persistent memory abstractions. Stratum S2 (persistent store), S3 (session-scoped), or S4 (functor projection). Source morphisms: CAN_HYDRATE. Target morphisms: OWNS, CAN_PERSIST.

entries.label: LLM Context Window
entries.description: Ephemeral in-flight memory holding the active model context window. Scoped to a single inference session. Collapses at session end (S3 stratum — runtime-scoped). No CAN_PERSIST target; read-only from graph perspective.

entries.label: Vector Embedding Store
entries.description: Persistent vector database for semantic search over knowledge-base embeddings. Receives CAN_HYDRATE from app_template and CAN_PERSIST to infra_service backing store. Target for Embedding functor (FUN03).

notes: memory_store covers all memory abstraction classes: ephemeral context, durable vector, key-value, and episodic. Stratum S4 entries represent functor projection outputs (read-only views). Do not assert S4 entries without a functor definition in ontology.json.
